name: Pork with Sweet Potatoes and Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Sweet potatoes, baked or cooked
4 Pineapple rings in juice drained (SAVE JUICE)
2 tablespoons Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tablespoons Pineapple juice from can
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from pork chops and brown them well on both sides in a heavy skillet.
2. Drain the chops on paper towels.
3. Arrange the pineapple rings in a shallow casserole dish.
4. Lay the chops on top of the pineapple, followed by the baked sweet potatoes.
5. Heat the pineapple juice to boiling in the casserole dish.
6. Stir in brown sugar, cornstarch mixture, and salt until the syrup thickens and clears.
7. Add dry sherry and butter to the hot syrup.
8. Pour over the pineapple, pork chops, and sweet potatoes.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, covered.
10. During the last 15 minutes of baking, uncover and complete cooking.
